candidate_scout: Explore the repository for user-triggered action entrypoints and map likely workflow paths without relying on a prebuilt candidate list.
focus_selector: Choose one action-anchored workflow for today's audit and explain why it is the best bounded direction.
correctness_reviewer: Review correctness and regression risk of the chosen issue or fix, keeping the analysis tightly scoped.
performance_reviewer: Review runtime or build-performance implications and require command-backed or script-backed evidence before treating performance claims as formal findings.
optimization_reviewer: Review maintainability and quality of optimization ideas, and require script-backed or harness-backed evidence before elevating optimization claims into formal findings.
verification_agent: Check blast radius, changed files, and command-backed verification evidence for the single chosen issue.
evolution_curator: Summarize what should become reusable skills or future evolution inputs.
repo-analyst: Use repository-scale recursive analysis to explore the whole codebase, locate workflows, and trace cross-file impact when local context is not enough. Call with JSON containing question plus optional file_paths and keywords.
